productDisplayName: Chhota Bheem Analog Kids-Boys Torquoise Blue Watch
description: Carry Bheem along wherever you go with this stylish analog wrist watch from chhota bheem. Made of soft and flexible plastic straps and colourful prints of Bheem, this watch is a perfect gift to make your little one squeal in delight. Case diameter: 40 mm Case thickness: 10 mm Dial shape: Rectangle Analog wrist watch in one piece, with flexible plastic straps for abrasion free comfort Tang clasp to customise the Fit Bheem's pictures printed on the straps and dial for style Fixed bezel with a white dial and numbers printed Fluorescent hands to display time in low light conditions Screw to reset time
